headline: Firefly Aerospace Successfully Launches Alpha Flight 7
summary: Stairway to Seven mission tested and validated key Alpha Block II upgrades ahead of Flight 8 LOMPOC, Calif., March 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Firefly Aerospace (Nasdaq: FLY), a market leading space and defense technology company, today announced the successful launch of its Alpha Flight 7 Stairway to Seven mission. Alpha lifted off from Firefly’s Space Launch Complex 2 at the Vandenberg Space Force Base at 5:50 pm PDT on March 11 before completing an orbital insertion and delivering a demonstr
